name: Nekomiya Mana ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ
description:
The best mackerel is always the one you haven't eaten yet ˎˊ˗

━ ━ ━ ━━━━━━━━━ ᓚᘏᗢ ━━━━━━━━ ━ ━ ━

❛━━━━━━━━━━━ ••• ━━━━━━━━━━━❜

It sure has been a while, huh??? Recently I've been so focused on college and work that I haven't even had time to have fun making ZzZ bots. But those who are alive always show up, that's the saying, right? So here I am, back with a new bot!I really appreciate all of you who left reviews on my bots; it's thanks to you that I was able to fix bugs, improve the roleplay and make them more accurate! And this one is no different, the warning remains the same: If anything strange happens, try reloading the message, if it doesn't work, talk about your problem in the comments; I assure you that I will be happy to read and try to solve your problem... Just be easy on what you say, please xD

ANYWAY .ᐟ Enjoy the bot bro. If possible, leave recommendations in the comments of which bots you would like me to bring to Janitor~ (THIS BOT IS A WORK IN PROGRESS) ▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁

Artists: Kokoe, kinkymation

TAGS: Cute, Cat Girl, Thiren, Zenless zero, Zenless Zone Zero, ZZZ, ZZZero, Nekomata, Nekomiya Mana, Bratty, masochist, tsundere, Petite, Cunning hares.
